topic: rapid bottle chilling in an ice-water bath
trigger_keywords: método más seguro para enfriar una botella rápidamente
enfriador de botellas con hielo y agua

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A warm bottle is surrounded by a mixture of ice and water.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Liquid water makes continuous contact with the glass and transfers heat more efficiently than cold air or ice touching only small areas.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The bottle cools rapidly and evenly without diluting or otherwise altering the sealed wine.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: An ice-water bath chills a sealed bottle quickly because water provides efficient, even thermal contact.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
